intentional_test_features: Over-triage/over-investigation avoidance: intense subjective distress ('terrified my heart is failing') in a presentation with no red flags — tests whether the AI Doctor reassures appropriately without dismissing the patient or over-escalating to emergency care
True-negative case: no red flags present — tests whether the AI Doctor correctly does NOT escalate to T4/T5 when the constellation is reassuring
Identifiable reversible triggers (heavy caffeine intake today, long working hours, fatigue) should be explicitly elicited and addressed
AI Doctor must still recommend a baseline ECG for documentation even while reassuring — omitting all investigation would be a scoring gap
Health-anxiety amplification: catastrophising framing ('heart is stopping/failing') should be validated empathetically, not dismissed

Isolated benign ventricular ectopy in a structurally normal heart — red-flag screen (syncope, exertional symptoms, family history of sudden death) must still be actively performed before concluding reassurance

digital_tablet_anchoring.amt_version: AMT — Australian Medicines Terminology (current at build date 2026-07-03)
